case_title: CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIF vs. BURNS, BRIAN PARICK IND. DBA BAY AREA HIGH REACH et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR     NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION AND      HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA;       CARPENTERS APPRENTICESHIP AND TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURNS, BRIAN PARICK IND. DBA BAY AREA HIGH REACH $20,634.41 PRINCIPAL, $2,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,000.05 INTEREST, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,159.46
